role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused entirely on script, diacritics, and vocabulary found on the sign.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil color (laterite), and vegetation density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant families (Musa, Bambusoideae) and forest types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road width, shoulder quality, and signage standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure details (blue tarps, underbone motorcycles) to narrow candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Vietnam. The linguistic agent provided the definitive evidence (Vietnamese text), which the tournament judge used effectively to eliminate all other candidates. The reasoning was consistent and grounded in the image.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly identified laterite soil and tropical vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described road width and shoulder.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified blue tarp and motorcycle style.
